Industry Standard: Move focus to previous interactive element
Notes & Recommendations: WCAG 2.1 SC 2.1.1 – required for all keyboard users

Notes & Recommendations: WCAG 2.1 SC 2.4.1 – required. Common pattern: "Skip to main content" link as first focusable element

Notes & Recommendations: Windows/browser standard for panel navigation

Notes & Recommendations: Best practice (YouTube, Netflix). Highly recommended for discoverability

Notes & Recommendations: Standard form submission behaviour

Notes & Recommendations: Standard ARIA carousel/listbox pattern

Notes & Recommendations: Standard combobox activation

Notes & Recommendations: Common in EPG/TV guide products. Nice-to-have for power users.

Notes & Recommendations: WCAG 2.1 SC 2.1.1

Notes & Recommendations: ARIA tab pattern – arrow keys move between tabs

Notes & Recommendations: Common in modern streaming platforms (YouTube, Netflix). Low barrier to add.

Notes & Recommendations: Matches standard seek behavior.

Notes & Recommendations: YouTube/widely adopted standard. Complements arrow key seeking.

Industry Standard: Fast-forward 10 seconds
Notes & Recommendations: YouTube/widely adopted standard. Complements arrow key seeking.

Notes & Recommendations: YouTube and Netflix standard. Verify no conflict with grid arrow keys.

Industry Standard: Mute / unmute audio
Notes & Recommendations: Essential for accessibility. Fully implemented.

TTV+ Current Behavior: Toggles the video in and out of full-screen mode
Industry Standard: Toggle full-screen mode
Notes & Recommendations: Standard browser video shortcut. Matches expectation.

Industry Standard: Toggle theater / mini mode
Notes & Recommendations: YouTube standard. Nice-to-have.

Industry Standard: Toggle Closed Captions on or off
Notes & Recommendations: Critical for WCAG 2.1 SC 1.2.2. High priority — affects deaf and hard-of-hearing users.

Industry Standard: Increase / decrease caption font size
Notes & Recommendations: WCAG 2.1 SC 1.4.4 – text must be resizable. Improves readability for low-vision users.

Industry Standard: Toggle audio description for visually impaired users
Notes & Recommendations: Critical for WCAG 2.1 SC 1.2.5. High priority — affects blind and low-vision users.

Industry Standard: Decrease / increase playback speed
Notes & Recommendations: YouTube standard. Important for users who need slower playback (cognitive accessibility).

Industry Standard: Next / previous video in playlist or queue
Notes & Recommendations: YouTube and Netflix standard.

Notes & Recommendations: ARIA menu pattern – arrow keys move between items, not Tab

Notes & Recommendations: Standard ARIA menu activation pattern

Notes & Recommendations: ARIA menu pattern requirement – focus must return to trigger element

Notes & Recommendations: ARIA dialog pattern – focus must not escape to background content while modal is open

Notes & Recommendations: Standard activation pattern

Notes & Recommendations: WCAG 2.1 SC 2.1.1

Notes & Recommendations: Standard activation pattern

Notes & Recommendations: ARIA radio group pattern
